## Summary

A concise description of the documentation issue.

## Location

Identify the file, section, notebook cell, or rendered page if known.

## Problem

Describe what is inaccurate, unclear, stale, or missing.

## Proposed correction

Provide the narrowest correction that resolves the issue.
